scripts.generate: bun run packages/fhir-ts-codegen/src/cli.ts --config packages/types-fhir/generate.config.ts && bun run packages/fhir-ts-codegen/src/cli.ts --config packages/fhir-zod/generate.config.ts
scripts.version:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && bun run version:sync
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && bun run version:sync
scripts.version:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version && bun run version:sync
scripts.publish:all: bun run publish:codegen && bun run publish:zod
